sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ جُزْءًا مِن حَيَاتِنَا اليَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetna inteligencija postala je dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence has become a part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا فِي الهَوَاتِفِ وَالحَوَاسِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ovu tehnologiju u telefonima i računarima.
sentences.translationEn: We use this technology in phones and computers.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ البَرَامِجُ النَّاسَ فِي تَنْظِيمِ أَعْمَالِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ovi programi pomažu ljudima u organizaciji njihovih poslova.
sentences.translationEn: These programs help people organize their work.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَقِدُ الخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ المُسْتَقْبَلَ سَيَكُونُ أَفْضَلَ بِفَضْلِ العِلْمِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci vjeruju da će budućnost biti bolja zahvaljujući nauci.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe the future will be better thanks to science.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِ هَذِهِ الأَدَوَاتِ الجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti uče kako koristiti ove nove alate.
sentences.translationEn: Students are learning how to use these new tools.
